testcase.name: testBasicFlightSearchWithTimeFilter[istanbul, ankara, 05.06.2026, 12.06.2026](1)

failure.message: All displayed flights should have departure AND arrival between 10:00 and 18:00. Departure times found: [14:10, 15:05, 11:00, 10:00, 16:00, 18:00, 13:00, 14:00, 15:00, 11:00, 16:00, 18:00] expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testBasicFlightSearchWithTimeFilter[istanbul, izmir, 20.06.2026, 27.06.2026](2)

failure.message: All displayed flights should have departure AND arrival between 10:00 and 18:00. Departure times found: [16:50, 10:00, 11:00, 13:00, 15:00, 16:00, 17:00, 18:00, 14:00, 12:10, 16:35, 17:35, 14:35, 15:50, 12:00, 10:00, 17:55] expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testCriticalUserJourney[istanbul, ankara, 05.06.2026, 12.06.2026](1)

failure.message: Round-trip selection should transition to booking step (URL change or booking container visible). expected [true] but found [false]
